asset.title: Workbook Style Toggle
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates toggling between Excel, Sheets, and Evidence views for a workbook, maintaining state and context across modes.

featureClarity.evidence: Dropdown menu allows switching between Excel, Sheets, and Evidence views with immediate visual updates.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates selecting the file, opening it, and cycling through all three view modes.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean spreadsheet interface with consistent layout and clear active cell highlighting.

consistency.evidence: Integrates seamlessly with the NodeRoom workspace, chat, and versioned spreadsheet panel.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from the live application interface showing real-time UI state changes.

legibility.evidence: Text in the spreadsheet cells and dropdown options is readable at standard browser sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts who require different presentation styles for audit and review.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts local UI style changes without overclaiming backend modifications.

observedEvidence: Excel view mode with gridlines and formula bar
Sheets view mode with simplified styling
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Toggle between Excel, Sheets, and Evidence views to match your review and presentation preferences.
